description: Fix 5 TUI bugs: zombie tabs, scrollback, review logs, time saved, notification

userStories.description:
In executor.rs, after execute_story returns for a fix story inside run_review_for_level (lines 859-901), emit a StoryComplete event with the fix_id and appropriate duration/file stats on success (after line 886). On failure (after line 893), also emit StoryComplete or a cleanup event so the story is removed from active_stories.

Key file: crates/baro-tui/src/executor.rs lines 859-901
userStories.title: Emit StoryComplete for fix stories in executor

userStories.description:
In app.rs StoryComplete handler (lines 361-378), verify it handles fix story IDs that aren't in app.stories gracefully — the find may return None for fix stories, which is fine, but active_stories.remove(story_id) must still execute unconditionally. Ensure the handler doesn't skip the active_stories removal when the story isn't found in app.stories.

Key file: crates/baro-tui/src/app.rs lines 361-378
userStories.title: Ensure app.rs StoryComplete handler is robust for fix stories
Fix terminal scrollback not cleared

userStories.description:
In execute_dashboard.rs render_logs function (line 136-188), review logs are only shown when active_ids.is_empty() AND app.review_in_progress is true AND review_logs is non-empty. But when the review completes (ReviewComplete sets review_in_progress=false in app.rs:440), the logs immediately disappear and the user sees 'Waiting for next story...' instead.

The fix: Change the condition at line 137 from:
  if app.review_in_progress && !app.review_logs.is_empty() {
To:
  if !app.review_logs.is_empty() {

This way review logs remain visible even after the review completes, until new stories start (which will populate active_ids and show story logs instead). The review_in_progress flag can still be used in the title to show whether review is active or done.

Update the title to reflect status: when review_in_progress is true show spinner + 'Review Level N', when false show 'Review Level N (done)'.

Key file: crates/baro-tui/src/screens/execute_dashboard.rs lines 136-188
userStories.title: Fix review agent logs not visible when review not in progress

userStories.description:
In app.rs StoryComplete handler (lines 361-378), verify that duration_secs is being correctly set on matching stories. The story_id in the StoryComplete event (emitted at executor.rs:1083) must match story IDs in app.stories (initialized from incomplete stories at executor.rs:941-956). In resume mode, completed stories won't be in app.stories, so the find at app.rs:367 may return None — ensure this doesn't silently lose duration data needed for the completion screen.

Key file: crates/baro-tui/src/app.rs lines 361-378
userStories.title: Fix duration_secs tracking in StoryComplete handler

userStories.description:
In execute_completion.rs (lines 34-49), make the sequential_time calculation robust. Add a fallback: if sequential_time is 0 but stories completed > 0, calculate from DoneStats or wall_time. Only show 'Time saved' line if sequential_time > wall_time (avoid showing nonsensical or empty values).

Key file: crates/baro-tui/src/screens/execute_completion.rs lines 34-49
userStories.title: Add fallback for time saved display in completion screen

userStories.description:
Verify the notification code in main.rs (lines 158-178). The user wants:
1. Notification runs AFTER LeaveAlternateScreen (line 154) - ALREADY TRUE
2. Uses std::process::Command (not tokio) since we're outside async runtime - ALREADY TRUE (line 165)
3. osascript command format should be: osascript -e 'display notification "All stories complete" with title "baro"'

Current code at line 168 uses: 'display notification "baro: all stories complete" with title "baro"' - the message text should be changed to match the user's specification: 'display notification "All stories complete" with title "baro"'

Also verify that spawn() is the right approach (vs output() or status()) - spawn() is non-blocking which is fine for a notification.

Key file: crates/baro-tui/src/main.rs lines 158-178
userStories.title: Verify and fix notification code

userStories.description:
Run cargo build on the entire workspace and ensure zero warnings. Run cargo clippy if available. Review all changes from S1-S5 together to ensure they don't conflict or introduce regressions.

Key checks:
1. cargo build --workspace produces zero warnings
2. All event handling in app.rs is consistent (no unhandled cases)
3. The fix story StoryComplete events from S1a don't cause issues with progress counting
4. The review logs display from S3 doesn't cause rendering issues when transitioning between states
5. Token tracking still works for fix stories
userStories.title: Final cargo build zero-warnings check and integration validation
